# Nextflow Summit 2026

Transcripts and digests from the Nextflow Summit (April 30 – May 1, 2026), held in person and live-streamed via Goldcast. Three sessions captured, two days, ~25 talks across keynotes, scientific applications, enterprise architecture, and an AI panel.

**Caveat:** Transcripts are auto-generated English captions on the live stream. Misheard names and technical terms are common — for example, "Vicksville" appears throughout in place of "Nextflow," and "Seqera" is variously transcribed as "Sigara / secura / Sequeira / Securitas." Use search for exact quotes; treat speaker names as best-effort inferences until confirmed.

## Start here

- **[Themes & takeaways](themes.md)** — cross-day synthesis, the five recurring threads, surprises worth flagging, tool-by-day index.

## Per-day digests

Talk-by-talk summaries with speaker, key tools, and "why it matters" notes:

| Digest | Date | Highlights |
|---|---|---|
| [Day 1 (AM)](digest/day-1-am.md) | 2026-04-30 | Floden keynote, Lorena's AI bake-off, Phil Ewels on Rust-QC, Paolo on Nextflow 26.04, vaccinology / microbial / spatial apps |
| [Day 1 (PM)](digest/day-1-pm.md) | 2026-04-30 | Tycho's protein-design Co-Scientist demo, ADMET MLOps, GPU realities, Bactopia v4, GSK Omics Workbench, Tommy Tang's reproducibility keynote |
| [Day 2](digest/day-2.md) | 2026-05-01 | Training & ambassadors, hackathon recap, Microsoft Foundry agent demo, Pfizer iFox/Lamin, Azure storage tiering, closing AI panel |
